sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat(
'SELECT
    ConfigId,
    ProjectName,
    LoadOrder,
    SourceContainer,
    SourceDirectory,
    FileName,
    TargetSchema,
    TargetTable,
    SilverProcName,
    EnableSilver
FROM config.IngestionConfig
WHERE IsActive = 1
  AND ProjectName = ''',
pipeline().parameters.pProjectName,
'''
ORDER BY LoadOrder'
)

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    ConfigId,
    SourceContainer,
    SourceDirectory,
    FileName,
    TargetSchema,
    TargetTable,
    SilverProcName,
    EnableSilver
FROM config.IngestionConfig
WHERE IsActive = 1
ORDER BY ConfigId;

content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('bronze.customers', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE bronze.customers;
GO

CREATE TABLE bronze.customers
(
    customer_id     VARCHAR(50)    NULL,
    customer_name   VARCHAR(200)   NULL,
    city            VARCHAR(100)   NULL,
    signup_date     VARCHAR(50)    NULL,
    filename        VARCHAR(255)   NULL,
    etlrunid        VARCHAR(100)   NULL,
    createdate      DATETIME       NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO


IF OBJECT_ID('bronze.products', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE bronze.products;
GO

CREATE TABLE bronze.products
(
    product_id      VARCHAR(50)    NULL,
    product_name    VARCHAR(200)   NULL,
    category        VARCHAR(100)   NULL,
    unit_price      VARCHAR(50)    NULL,
    filename        VARCHAR(255)   NULL,
    etlrunid        VARCHAR(100)   NULL,
    createdate      DATETIME       NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('bronze.orders', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE bronze.orders;
GO

CREATE TABLE bronze.orders
(
    order_id        VARCHAR(50)    NULL,
    customer_id     VARCHAR(50)    NULL,
    product_id      VARCHAR(50)    NULL,
    quantity        VARCHAR(50)    NULL,
    order_date      VARCHAR(50)    NULL,
    filename        VARCHAR(255)   NULL,
    etlrunid        VARCHAR(100)   NULL,
    createdate      DATETIME       NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO

/*============================================================
  Ensure schema exists
============================================================*/
IF NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.schemas
    WHERE name = 'config'
)
BEGIN
    EXEC ('CREATE SCHEMA config');
END;
GO

/*============================================================
  Recreate table
============================================================*/
IF OBJECT_ID('config.IngestionConfig', 'U') IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
    DROP TABLE config.IngestionConfig;
END;
GO

/*============================================================
  Create table
============================================================*/
CREATE TABLE config.IngestionConfig
(
    ConfigId         INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
    IsActive         BIT NOT NULL
        CONSTRAINT DF_IngestionConfig_IsActive DEFAULT (1),

    SourceContainer  VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
    SourceDirectory  VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
    FileName         VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,

    TargetSchema     VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
    TargetTable      VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,

    SilverProcName   VARCHAR(256) NULL,
    EnableSilver     BIT NOT NULL
        CONSTRAINT DF_IngestionConfig_EnableSilver DEFAULT (1)
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO

/*============================================================
  Load config rows
============================================================*/
TRUNCATE TABLE config.IngestionConfig;
GO

INSERT INTO config.IngestionConfig
(
    SourceContainer,
    SourceDirectory,
    FileName,
    TargetSchema,
    TargetTable,
    SilverProcName,
    EnableSilver
)
SELECT 'test', 'source', 'customers.csv', 'bronze', 'customers', 'silver.sp_load_customers', 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'test', 'source', 'products.csv',  'bronze', 'products',  'silver.sp_load_products', 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'test', 'source', 'orders.csv',    'bronze', 'orders',    'silver.sp_load_orders', 1;
GO

/*============================================================
  Check config
============================================================*/
SELECT *
FROM config.IngestionConfig;
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.customers', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE silver.customers;
GO

CREATE TABLE silver.customers
(
    customer_id      INT            NOT NULL,
    customer_name    VARCHAR(200)   NOT NULL,
    city             VARCHAR(100)   NULL,
    signup_date      DATE           NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.products', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE silver.products;
GO

CREATE TABLE silver.products
(
    product_id      INT             NOT NULL,
    product_name    VARCHAR(200)    NOT NULL,
    category        VARCHAR(100)    NULL,
    unit_price      DECIMAL(18,2)   NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.orders', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE silver.orders;
GO

CREATE TABLE silver.orders
(
    order_id INT NULL,
    customer_id INT NULL,
    product_id INT NULL,
    quantity INT NULL,
    order_date DATE NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_customers', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_customers;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_customers
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE silver.customers;

    INSERT INTO silver.customers
    (
        customer_id,
        customer_name,
        city,
        signup_date
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(customer_id)) AS INT),
        LTRIM(RTRIM(customer_name)),
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(city)), ''),
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(signup_date)) AS DATE)
    FROM bronze.customers
    WHERE TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(customer_id)) AS INT) IS NOT NULL;
END;
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_products', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_products;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_products
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE silver.products;

    INSERT INTO silver.products
    (
        product_id,
        product_name,
        category,
        unit_price
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(product_id)) AS INT),
        LTRIM(RTRIM(product_name)),
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(category)), ''),
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(unit_price)) AS DECIMAL(18,2))
    FROM bronze.products
    WHERE TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(product_id)) AS INT) IS NOT NULL;
END;
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_orders', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_orders;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_orders
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE silver.orders;

    INSERT INTO silver.orders
    (
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        product_id,
        quantity,
        order_date
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(order_id)) AS INT),
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(customer_id)) AS INT),
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(product_id)) AS INT),
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(quantity)) AS INT),
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(order_date)) AS DATE)
    FROM bronze.orders
    WHERE TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(order_id)) AS INT) IS NOT NULL;
END;
GO


IF OBJECT_ID('silver.usp_exec', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.usp_exec;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.usp_exec
    @load_run_id NVARCHAR(100),
    @procname NVARCHAR(256)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @sql NVARCHAR(MAX);

    IF @procname IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@procname)) = ''
    BEGIN
        THROW 50001, 'procname is required', 1;
    END;

    SET @sql = N'EXEC ' + @procname;

    EXEC sp_executesql @sql;
END;
GO
